channel.title: gnuradio on François Lancelot
channel.description: Recent content in gnuradio on François Lancelot

item.title: Audio classification on FM radio broadcasts :radio:
item.description: The transmitted FM signal is received by using a simple RTL-SDR dongle, which provides the baseband FM modulated signal. This signal is demodulated with GNURadio and then a deep learning model classifies the audio segments into three different classes : music, speech, and ads. Developed with a RTL-SDR USB dongle, GNURadio, gr-osmosdr, and PANNs, Pretrained Audio Neural Networks for Audio Pattern Recognition.
